description: Ignite the spirit of the Festival of Lights with a vibrant, interactive email template featuring captivating Hanukkah gifs. This engaging template is perfect for sending warm holiday greetings, sharing exciting offers and promoting exclusive deals. It's designed to resonate with the rich traditions of Hanukkah, making it a great way to connect with your audience during this special time. Whether you're a business looking to boost holiday sales or simply wishing to spread joy and warmth, this email template lets you do it in style. Celebrate Hanukkah 2021 by sending out emails that perfectly encapsulate the holiday's essence and generate a buzz with your promotions. This template is just what you need to make this year's Hanukkah celebrations truly memorable.
short_description: Ignite the spirit of Hanukkah 2021 with a vibrant email template featuring engaging gifs. Perfect for holiday greetings, sharing offers and promotions. Connect with your audience and boost holiday sales with this festive, interactive template. Make your Hanukkah celebrations memorable.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

Holiday Hours

The Bakery will be closed November 28 - December 6 to allow our employees time to celebrate Hanukkah with their families. 

 

HOURS

Monday - Friday: 8 - 5

Saturday: 8 - 3

Sunday: 12 - 4

 
 

Delivery

Delivery will be offered within 15 miles of the bakery. All other orders will need to be picked up. For easy ordering, please use our app to place your order.

DOWNLOAD APP
 
 

Follow us to keep up with new menu items and store updates!

 
 

Where to find us:

Changed your mind? You can unsubscribe at any time.
